chapter_title.en: When Mohammad ibn Abi Bakr, governor of Egypt, was overpowered and killed

text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) لمّا قلد محمّد بن أبي بكر مصر فملكت عليه وقتل

en.sayed-ali-raza: When Amīr al-mu’minīn appointed Muḥammad ibn Abi Bakr [1] Governor of Egypt and he was overpowered and killed, Amīr al-mu’minīn said :
